name: John Gurney Park
description: John Gurney Park is a place to play pickleball in Hart, MI. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Johnson Square Recreation Area
description: Come play pickleball at Johnson Square Recreation Area in Mears, MI! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: North Pentwater Tennis/Pickleball Courts
description: North Pentwater Tennis/Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Pentwater, MI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like water.

name: Pentwater Park public pickelball
description: Come play pickleball at Pentwater Park public pickelball in Pentwater, MI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Pentwater Tennis Club
description: Pentwater Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pentwater, MI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
